role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of text and remained within script/language analysis.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation, and climate cues (taiga, flatness).
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed specific tree species (Scots Pine, Silver Birch) and understory.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road markings and infrastructure standards (double yellow lines).
role_adherence_notes.meta: Evaluated camera generation artifacts and general road texture.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the country. The specialists provided high-quality, image-grounded evidence (species, terrain). The tournament successfully used this evidence to eliminate non-Nordic candidates and distinguish Finland from Sweden based on the 'strongly_support' signal from the landscape agent.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Accurately described the flat, mossy, pine-dominant terrain.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Accurately identified the visible tree species.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Accurately described the double yellow lines.
